title: Generating a Summary of a Complex Technical Document
scenario: Write a prompt to generate a summary of a complex technical document on machine learning algorithms. The output should be a clear and concise markdown table with the following columns: 'Algorithm', 'Description', 'Key Features', 'Use Cases'. The table should highlight the strengths and weaknesses of each algorithm and provide a brief overview of their applications. The prompt should include specific instructions for handling technical jargon and complex terminology.
constraints: Use markdown formatting for the table
Include specific instructions for handling technical jargon and complex terminology

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated markdown table meets the formatting and handling instructions.
Ensure the table contents accurately represent the original document.
Evaluate the ability of the prompt to handle complex terminology and technical jargon.
